description_long: This house features a rustic stone exterior with a red-tiled gable roof and two prominent chimneys. The front facade includes a wooden door and four rectangular windows, all framed in a simple, functional style. A spacious, tiled patio is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing an outdoor area that complements the house's traditional look. The side walls are largely unadorned, with one circular attic window and a mix of small and large rectangular windows. The roof is steeply pitched, with the main section running the length of the building and a smaller gable intersecting at one end. The overall design suggests a blend of rural and suburban influences, with practical materials and a straightforward layout.
description: A rustic stone house with a red-tiled gable roof, multiple chimneys, and a fenced patio. The facade features a wooden door and several rectangular windows, blending traditional and functional design.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a large patio, two chimneys, and three windows, highlighting the stone wall and wooden fencing.
description_view_1: The long side of the house is visible, displaying a continuous red-tiled roof, four windows, and both chimneys at the far end.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the opposite long side, with three windows and a partial view of the patio and fencing.
description_view_3: The front of the house is shown, featuring the main wooden door, four windows, the patio, and the wooden fence enclosing the entrance area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no overhang, set into a stone facade and accessed via a tiled patio enclosed by a wooden fence.
